description_long: This is a robust, double-headed sledgehammer with a cylindrical, textured head and a long, straight handle. The head features symmetrical, rounded striking faces on both ends, with subtle ridges and grooves for added grip and visual interest. The handle is elongated, tapering slightly towards the end, and displays a series of horizontal grooves for enhanced grip and control. The entire object has a dark, metallic appearance, suggesting it is made primarily of metal, possibly steel, with a consistent finish throughout. There are no visible brand markings, logos, or decorative elements, giving it a utilitarian and functional look. The hammer appears to be in pristine condition, with no visible signs of wear, damage, or accessories attached.
description: A heavy, double-headed sledgehammer with a textured metal head and a long, grooved handle, all in a dark metallic finish. The design is utilitarian and pristine, with no visible markings or accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical, double-headed hammer with both striking faces and the full length of the handle visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the cylindrical shape of the hammer head and the straight, grooved handle extending downward.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the opposite striking face and the handle's length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizes the cylindrical head and the handle's straight, textured design.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, elongated metal handle with horizontal grooves for grip, likely steel, non-ergonomic and textured.
attribute_head_type: Double-headed sledgehammer type with cylindrical, symmetrical heads and rounded striking faces, no claws or peens.
